creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
share/licq/qt-gui/locale/
		is not fulle generated anymore.
	share/licq/contrib/
		does not exist
	share/licq/qt-gui/skin.*/
		xpm have been converted in png

How-To-Repeat: 
	make package:

< tar: can't add file share/licq/qt-gui/skin.shale/butMenuDown.xpm : No such file or directory
